title: How to effectively utilise AI to enhance large-scale refactoring
summary: This blog post from Atlassian details a practical approach for using AI, specifically the Rovo Dev agent, to perform large-scale, automated refactoring of a frontend monorepo. The project focused on removing all Navigation (Nav4) feature flags and mocks across over 1,400 files, a task described as impossible for two developers to do manually. The presented solution outlines a repeatable workflow involving persistent AI context, discovery prompts to catalogue targets, package-level cleanup methods, and parallel execution in multiple environments. Key findings emphasized that AI can apply code patterns and analyze failures when given a thinking process, outperforming simple script generation, and that codified context and tight feedback loops are critical for safe, quality results. The outlined approach culminated in a robust automation pipeline that achieved a twofold increase in productivity.
author: Yuchen Qiao
